message:
feat(dcg): add pending exceptions REST API endpoints

Add complete REST API for DCG pending exceptions allow-once workflow,
enabling users to manage blocked command approvals through a clean
HTTP interface.

## New Endpoints

### Listing & Retrieval
- GET /dcg/pending
  - List pending exceptions with optional filters
  - Query params: status, agentId, limit
  - Returns empty list or paginated results

- GET /dcg/pending/:shortCode
  - Get specific exception by short code
  - Returns 404 if not found

### Approval Workflow
- POST /dcg/pending/:shortCode/approve
  - Approve exception for single execution
  - Tracks approver for audit trail
  - Returns 410 (Gone) if expired
  - Returns 409 (Conflict) if already processed

- POST /dcg/pending/:shortCode/deny
  - Deny exception with optional reason
  - Body: { reason?: string }
  - Tracks denier for audit trail

### Validation (for DCG integration)
- POST /dcg/pending/:shortCode/validate
  - Validate exception before allowing execution
  - Requires exact command hash match
  - Checks status and expiration
  - Returns { valid: boolean, reason?: string, exception? }

- POST /dcg/pending/validate-hash
  - Alternative: lookup by command hash directly
  - For DCG pre-execution check without short code

## Implementation Notes
- All endpoints use standardized response wrappers
- Error handling via custom exception classes
- Builds options conditionally (exactOptionalPropertyTypes)
- Consistent with existing DCG route patterns

This completes the API layer for bead flywheel_gateway-5sq
(DCG: Implement Pending Exceptions).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
